programs.title: How It's Made
programs.sub_title: Exercise Bikes, Cornish Pastries, Pasta Makers, and Slate Products
programs.desc: Find out how exercise bikes, cornish pastries, pasta makers, and slate products are made.

programs.title: How It's Made
programs.sub_title: Channel Signs, Wetsuits, and Aluminum Aircraft
programs.desc: How are channel signs are created, wetsuits are manufactured, and aluminium aircrafts made?

programs.title: Drive TV - Drive Car Of The Year
programs.desc: In this episode, we delve into the history of the Maserati GranTurismo. Jess meets a Sydney-based owner who has preserved their classic in pristine condition, while exploring how Maserati has refined and reinvented this Italian masterpiece.

programs.title: Tanked
programs.desc: Erika Girardi from the hit TV show, The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills needs a tank. Also known as Erika Jayne, this Diva knows exactly what she wants and that’s an octopus!

programs.title: Salvage Hunters
programs.desc: Drew Pritchard is thrilled to look through an oddball collection of military antiques in Nantes, France. Plus, he takes an interest in a de Sede sofa bed in the Netherlands.

programs.title: How Do They Do It?
programs.desc: How do the islanders of the Outer Hebrides use pedal power to weave world-famous Harris tweed? And, in Iceland, how do they prepare fermented shark?
